governance_fixture_two_pending_changes.description: Vite governance fixture after a principal own-grant and group grant are staged by UI interactions.
records: principal `settings-agent` staged via visible `reviews:write` own-grant checkbox
group `eng` staged via visible `reviews:write` grant checkbox

requirements.description: GIVEN two pending fixture changes WHEN tabs are switched through all governance tabs THEN banner and markers persist.

would_fail_if: per-tab local pending state not persisted
static shell omits shared pending store

requirements.description: GIVEN pending changes WHEN Commit changes is clicked THEN all pending indicators clear.
GIVEN fixture commit completed WHEN Principals and Groups are revisited THEN edited grants remain visible.
Pending banner and markers survive tab navigation across all four governance tabs.
Commit changes clears all pending UI indicators.
Committed fixture grants remain visible as effective state after pending clears.
Fixture evidence is labeled and not used as the sole sprint-close proof.
requirements.verify: rg -n "Fixture governance harness|Not product E2E evidence|fixture evidence" e2e/playwright/tests/governance-fixture e2e/playwright/fixtures/governance-app
